description.text: Defenses can be sacrificial. Cut down bridges, dig, and prepare layers of defences. One Cube and a Base.

ru.original: Defenses can be sacrificial. Cut down bridges, dig, and prepare layers of defences. One Cube and a Base.
ru.translation: Иногда надо идти на жертвы. Рушь мосты, рой рвы, в общем — делай всё, чтобы враг не прорвал оборону. Один куб и база.

es.original: Defenses can be sacrificial. Cut down bridges, dig, and prepare layers of defences. One Cube and a Base.
es.translation:
Deberás sacrificar las defensas para avanzar.
Un generador y un núcleo.

de.original: Defenses can be sacrificial. Cut down bridges, dig, and prepare layers of defences. One Cube and a Base.
de.translation: Sprengt Brücken, grabt und baut euch eine gute Verteidigung auf. Ein Generator und eine Basis.

pt.original: Defenses can be sacrificial. Cut down bridges, dig, and prepare layers of defences. One Cube and a Base.
pt.translation: As defesas podem ser sacrificiais. Derrube pontes, cave e prepare várias camadas de defesas. Um Cubo e uma Base.

fr.original: Defenses can be sacrificial. Cut down bridges, dig, and prepare layers of defences. One Cube and a Base.
fr.translation: Passez en mode défense sacrificielle. Détruisez les ponts, creusez et enterrez des lignes et des lignes de défense. Un cube et une base.
